upgrade.title: Upgrade to Full Account
upgrade.subtitle: Add an email and password to keep your data across devices and never lose access.
upgrade.success: Account upgraded! You can now log in with your email.

link.title: Link to Existing Account
link.subtitle: Already have an account? Sign in below to merge this guest account into your existing one. All your groups, expenses, and balances will be transferred.
link.success: Account linked! You are now logged in as your verified account.
link.success_google: Account linked via Google! You are now logged in as your verified account.

payment_methods.title: Payment Methods
payment_methods.label: Label
payment_methods.viet_qr_hint: QR code with amount will be auto-generated via VietQR
payment_methods.bank_select_hint: Select a bank to enable VietQR, or leave empty for other banks
payment_methods.qr_auto_hint: QR will be auto-generated with amount when others view it
payment_methods.empty: No payment methods yet. Add one so group members know how to pay you.
